description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant with broad, heart-shaped green leaves arranged on several upright stems. The leaves are a muted green with visible veins and are spaced to create a full, bushy appearance. The plant is housed in a simple, cylindrical pot that appears to be made of plastic, with a smooth, unadorned surface and a slightly flared rim. The pot contains dark soil, visible at the base of the stems, and the plant's stems are slender and green. There are no visible decorative elements or labels on the pot or plant. The overall look is clean and minimal, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad, heart-shaped green leaves in a plain, cylindrical plastic pot. The plant has a bushy, healthy appearance and is free of decorative elements or labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the layered arrangement of broad leaves and the plain, light-colored pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense foliage and the shadowed side of the pot.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the stems and the open top of the pot with visible soil.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the upright stems and the pot's smooth surface.
attribute_plant_species: heartleaf philodendron (Philodendron hederaceum) or similar broad-leafed houseplant
